Anthropic 今天为 Claude Managed Agents（托管智能体）上线了记忆功能，目前处于公测阶段。简单说，你部署的 AI 智能体现在能在多次会话之间积累经验，下次干活时不用从零开始。

Among all the model release furor, important to note that people don’t need to switch providers or declare a winner every time a new model is released.

Especially as Opus 4.7 is a good model too! (Especially since adaptive thinking got better)
Mythos benchmarks do not matter until released to the public. As far as I’m concerned it does not exist.

Both of these companies have access to their own best models internally. 

Maybe the ONLY benchmark that matters are the tools these companies are building themselves. https://t.co/vXBjrHWXfp

TIP OF THE DAY 

Instead of: "Explain this topic to me."

Prompt: "Teach me the 20% that explains 80% of what matters. Then give me one question that would reveal if I actually understood it."
